final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial food photography shot of a plated Michelin three-star French main course — slow-cooked duck breast with truffle sauce.

Style/medium: photorealistic commercial food photography, macro close-up, shallow depth of field, high color saturation, in the style of high-end restaurant editorial campaigns
Composition: macro close-up with precise focus on the cross-section texture of the sliced duck breast, shallow depth of field, side-lit framing, lens trained at plate level
Subject: neatly sliced slow-cooked duck breast with perfectly golden-brown crispy skin and blush-pink juicy interior; garnished with micro-vegetable garden elements — miniature carrots, purple chicory leaves, and edible flowers; fresh black truffle shavings layered on top
Scene/backdrop: dark veined marble countertop surface, upscale fine-dining restaurant atmosphere
Lighting/mood: dramatic side lighting raking across the plate to accentuate textures; warm golden key light with deep shadows creating a luxurious, intimate mood
Color palette: deep charcoal marble as base, warm golden-brown skin as anchor, blush pink meat interior as mid-tone, purple chicory and edible flowers as accent, glossy dark truffle sauce as contrast
Materials/textures: crispy rendered duck skin with visible crackling texture, moist fibrous meat cross-section, glossy truffle jus brushed artistically along the rim of a white bone-china plate, delicate petal surfaces, matte marble grain
Avoid: flat lighting, oversaturated cartoon food look, plastic-looking meat, cluttered background, watermark, generic stock-photo styling
